name: Chocolate Prune Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a bundt pan by greasing and flouring it.
3. Sprinkle the baking soda evenly over the prunes.
4. Pour boiling water over the prunes and let cool completely.
5. In a food processor, cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
6. Add eggs one at a time, mixing after each addition.
7. Incorporate the prune mixture and process for 15 seconds.
8. Sift flour and cocoa into a bowl; add to the food processor in three additions, alternating with on/off motions until just combined.
9. Pour batter into the prepared bundt pan.
10. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. When cool, turn the cake out onto a wire rack and sprinkle with powdered sugar if desired. Serve.
